rules.name: Cross-tenant denial

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL T9-037-Knowledge-Graph Control Catalog
knowledgeAssets.summary: The deterministic controls for this package. Enforced as executable rules: KG-021 (the universal AI-execution-boundary / cross-tenant controls). The remaining controls are carried here for traceability; detailed field-vs-literal rule tuning is a follow-up (see the hand-authored T9-001..010 packages for the target).
knowledgeAssets.contentText: KG-001 Entity registration | Governance | Require documented compliance: Entity registration | Critical | Data Governance. KG-002 Relationship provenance | Governance | Require documented compliance: Relationship provenance | Critical | Data Governance. KG-003 Source authority | Governance | Require documented compliance: Source authority | Critical | Data Governance. KG-004 Graph versioning | Governance | Require documented compliance: Graph versioning | Critical | Data Governance. KG-005 Tenant isolation | Governance | Require documented compliance: Tenant isolation | Critical | Data Governance. KG-006 Sensitive edge control | Governance | Require documented compliance: Sensitive edge control | Critical | Data Governance. KG-007 Duplicate entity resolution | Governance | Require documented compliance: Duplicate entity resolution | Critical | Data Governance. KG-008 Identity mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Identity mapping | Critical | Data Governance. KG-009 Confidence score | Governance | Require documented compliance: Confidence score | Critical | Data Governance. KG-010 Temporal validity | Governance | Require documented compliance: Temporal validity | Critical | Data Governance. KG-011 Legal ownership mapping | Governance | Require documented compliance: Legal ownership mapping | Critical | Data Governance. KG-012 Beneficial ownership | Governance | Require documented compliance: Beneficial ownership | Critical | Data Governance. KG-013 Dependency graph | Governance | Require documented compliance: Dependency graph | Critical | Data Governance. KG-014 Policy/control graph | Governance | Require documented compliance: Policy/control graph | Critical | Data Governance. KG-015 AI agent graph | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI agent graph | Critical | AI Governance. KG-016 Document linkage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Document linkage | High | Data Governance. KG-017 Lineage | Governance | Require documented compliance: Lineage | High | Data Governance. KG-018 Query authorization | Governance | Require documented compliance: Query authorization | High | Data Governance. KG-019 AI inference labeling | Preventive | Deny AI permission for: AI inference labeling | High | AI Governance. KG-020 No unsupported edge | Governance | Require documented compliance: No unsupported edge | High | Data Governance. KG-021 Cross-tenant denial | Preventive | Deny cross-tenant access | High | Security. KG-022 Graph audit | Governance | Require documented compliance: Graph audit | High | Data Governance. KG-023 Correction workflow | Governance | Require documented compliance: Correction workflow | High | Data Governance. KG-024 Retention | Evidence | Require documented evidence: Retention | High | Data Governance. KG-025 Recovery | Corrective | Execute recovery/rollback procedure | High | Data Governance.
